title: Problem with using stale auto-indexes created on materialized sub-selects within trigger programs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE NOT NULL, order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
CREATE TRIGGER update_order_timestamp AFTER UPDATE ON orders FOR EACH ROW UPDATE orders SET order_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = NEW.id;
key_bug_features: Using stale auto-indexes in trigger programs
